summary: AI failure-mode checklist (M1-M7) for research agents. Generic across domains; runs at the moments work becomes durable — folding a number or claim into the plan or contract, checking off a task-board item, a milestone closeout commit, handoff or submission material — and before A1-A5 approval gates in projects using the engine's approval flow.

install.claude_code: Packaged install copies this skill into the target Claude Code skills root. Installed copies do not auto-follow repo updates; reinstall or rerun install with --force to refresh. For live repo-tracking development installs, use packages/skills-market/scripts/install_symlink_claude_code.sh against the monorepo skills root; that helper symlinks all market-listed skill-pack entries into the target Claude Code skills root, not only research-integrity.
